summary: Dashboard mobile layout has critical brand palette violations and missing screen spec requirements

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral gray/white background instead of the required diner brand palette. Authenticated surfaces must share coherent brand palette with public routes per postmortem rule.
Dashboard background appears to use neutral UI defaults rather than the required diner palette surfaces (teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea).

actions: Apply diner brand palette to dashboard background - use cream #fff8ea or teal #9fd8d2 instead of neutral colors
Verify estimated bill widget shows/hides correctly based on data availability as specified
Ensure mobile drawer navigation remains accessible at 390px viewport
Validate that free-tier usage cards render when appropriate for user state
